# Weight Loss

**Summary**: A physical measurement of mass lost by metal coupons exposed to corrosive media over time.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1994-shokoya|Shokoya, 1994]] used weight-loss analysis to determine the corrosion rate and identify types of attack on steel coupons.

## Key Results and Findings

- Used as a primary method for determining the average corrosion rate in both static and dynamic conditions. ([[1994-shokoya|Shokoya, 1994, p. 13]])
